Category_Definition: Feedback about staff performance behavior and interpersonal interactions with reps agents associates or in-home experts across all service channels.
Topic_Definition: Whether the customer was acknowledged promptly upon entering the store and made to feel welcome.

Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer was greeted quickly upon arrival or felt immediately welcomed. Include: 'greeted right away' 'someone came up to me immediately' 'felt welcome' 'warm greeting' 'checked in right away' 'friendly welcome' 'acknowledged as soon as I walked in' 'signed me in quickly'. Strong first-impression driver for retail NPS.

Category_Definition: Feedback about staff performance behavior and interpersonal interactions with reps agents associates or in-home experts across all service channels.
Topic_Definition: Whether the customer was acknowledged promptly upon entering the store and made to feel welcome.

Category_Definition: Feedback about staff performance behavior and interpersonal interactions with reps agents associates or in-home experts across all service channels.
Topic_Definition: Time spent waiting in the store before being helped — includes check-in queue walk-in wait and appointment timeliness.

Category_Definition: Feedback about staff performance behavior and interpersonal interactions with reps agents associates or in-home experts across all service channels.
Topic_Definition: Time spent waiting in the store before being helped — includes check-in queue walk-in wait and appointment timeliness.

Category_Definition: Feedback about staff performance behavior and interpersonal interactions with reps agents associates or in-home experts across all service channels.
